changesProposed.name: 1X Technologies

verified.name: 1X Technologies
verified.description: Norwegian-American robotics and artificial intelligence company developing general-purpose humanoid robots for home environments. The company manufactures bipedal humanoid robots including the NEO model designed for private home use.
verified.notes: Company rebranded from Halodi Robotics to 1X Technologies in 2022. Wikipedia sources refer to the robotics company. Sources [0] and [1] describe a different 1X Technologies LLC (a wire and cable distributor founded 2015 in Sheridan, Wyoming) - these are distinct companies and sources [0] and [1] are not used for verification. Total raised calculated from Series A2 ($23.5M in March 2023) + Series B ($100M in January 2024) = $123.5M.

changesProposed.name: Aetherflux

verified.name: Aetherflux
verified.description: American renewable energy company developing space-based solar power using low Earth orbit satellites that transmit energy to ground stations through infrared lasers. Initial applications target artificial intelligence compute in orbit and power delivery to military and remote operations.
verified.notes: Database entry incorrectly listed stage as 'Series B'; Wikipedia confirms Series A funding of $50M announced April 2025, bringing total raised to $60M. Database entry did not list any investors; multiple investors identified in Wikipedia source. First space demonstration planned for early 2026; orbital data center ('Galactic Brain') targeted for Q1 2027.

changesProposed.name: Anysphere

current.name: Anysphere
current.founder: Michael Truell, Sualeh Asif, Aman Sanger, Arvid Lunnemark

verified.name: Anysphere
verified.description: American software company offering Cursor, an AI-assisted software development service. Founded in 2022 by MIT students, the company achieved a $29.3 billion valuation and surpassed $1 billion in annual recurring revenue by late 2025.
verified.notes: Series D funding round of $2.3B closed November 13, 2025, co-led by Accel and Coatue Management, resulting in $29.3B post-money valuation. Total raised calculation: $8M seed + $60M Series A + $900M Series C + $2.3B Series D = $3.268B, rounded to $3.3B+. Wikipedia indicates ARR exceeded $1B as of November 2025. As of April 21, 2026, xAI announced acquisition deal option for $60B or $10B for collaborative work.
